ALCHEMIST-INHALE.title: Inhale
ALCHEMIST-INHALE.description: [gold]Block[/gold] gained is equal to the sum of all [gold]Poison[/gold] across enemies, you, and your allies.
ALCHEMIST-LIFEBLOOD.title: Lifeblood
ALCHEMIST-LIFEBLOOD.description: Damage includes [gold]Regen[/gold] you would gain from this card.
ALCHEMIST-MASTERWORK.title: Masterwork
ALCHEMIST-MASTERWORK.description: This card glows [gold]gold[/gold] if you have [gold]Enchanted[/gold] five or more cards this combat, including the one you would [gold]Infuse[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.title: Overflow
ALCHEMIST-OVERFLOW.description: Hits ALL enemies a number of times equal to your [gold]Regen[/gold].
